# AgenticVelox - AI Automation Agency

## Overview
AgenticVelox is a premier AI automation agency specializing in building custom, 24/7 AI agents for businesses. We focus on streamlining operations, boosting sales, and automating customer support through advanced Generative AI and workflow automation technologies.

## Services
- **AI Sales Agents:** Custom AI agents that qualify leads, follow up instantly, and book meetings automatically.
- **Customer Support Automation:** AI-powered chatbots and ticketing systems that resolve tier-1 and tier-2 queries instantly, 24/7.
- **Operational Workflow Automation:** Connecting your existing SaaS tools (CRM, ERP, Slack, Email) using platforms like n8n and Zapier to eliminate manual data entry.
- **Custom LLM Integration:** Building bespoke tools powered by Large Language Models tailored to specific business data.

## Business Impact (Hard Statistics)
- Our systems save clients an average of $4,200/month in operational and administrative costs.
- Automated follow-ups increase lead conversion rates and drop no-show rates by up to 80%.
- Routine tasks are reduced by an average of 4 hours per day per employee.

## Pricing
We offer custom pricing based on the scope of the automation project. Engagements typically start with a comprehensive workflow audit and range from one-off builds to monthly retainer packages for continuous optimization.

- **Website:** https://www.agenticvelox.com
- **Email:** hello@agenticvelox.com

- **Book a Call:** Available via the website's contact form.
